Mtn To Compel Responses, Without Objections To Special Interoggs Set Two
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John T. Hendricks, Esq. of the Law Offices of John T. Hendricks, Tel. 415.986.9800, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. Plaintiff NOEL WEEKS' Motion To Compel Responses, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set Two is granted. Defendant Linda Catron is ordered to provide complete responses to interrogatories, without objection, within 10 days of service of this order. The issue of whether the defendant's responses dated 9/17/2013 are adequate will require a separate motion, as the notice of the present motion only sought an order requiring defendant to provide responses. Sanctions are awarded against Linda Catron in the amount of $500. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John T. Hendricks, Esq. of the Law Offices of John T. Hendricks, Tel. 415.986.9800, for plaintiff and moving party;
Paul A. Frassetto, Esq. of Frassetto Law Offices, Tel. 415.354.2700, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff NOEL WEEK's Motion to Compel Responses Request for Production of Documents, Set One, is GRANTED. Defendant LINDA CATRON shall serve amended, verified responses to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Request Nos. 1-4, 59-69 on or before March 15, 2013. Defendant LINDA CATRON shall produce the documents requested in Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Request Nos. 5, 11-15, on or before March 15, 2013. Defendant LINDA CATRON shall serve amended, verified responses to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Request Nos. 16-19, 23-26, 28-31, 34, 37-38 and produce the documents requested to the extent such documents are publicly available, on or before March 15, 2013. Defendant LINDA CATRON shall serve amended, verified responses to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Request Nos. 51-55 and produce the documents, which may be redacted to protect the privacy of any third parties identified, on or before March 15, 2013. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Proposed Order to be submitted to court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
